name: Waikiki Appetizers
recipeInstructions:
1. Shape sausage into 1/2 to 3/4 inch balls.
2. Place in single layer in baking pan.
3. Bake in a 400°F oven for 25 minutes, or until cooked; drain on paper towels.
4. Meanwhile, drain pineapple and reserve the syrup.
5. Add enough water to the syrup to measure 1 cup.
6. Combine with brown sugar, lemon juice, cornstarch, and soy sauce in a large saucepan.
7. Cook and stir until the sauce boils and thickens.
8. Fold in green pepper, cherries, pineapple chunks, and drained cooked sausage.
9. To serve, turn into chafing dish.
